title: Bombay High Court grants bail to convict in Narendra Dabholkar murder
description: The Bombay High Court on Wednesday granted bail to Sharad Kalaskar, one of the two men convicted in the 2013 murder of rationalist Narendra Dabholkar, after recording prima facie doubts about his identification as one of the assailants and noting his prolonged incarceration. [Sharad Kalaskar v. State of Maharashtra & Anr.]A division bench of Justices AS Gadkari and RR Bhonsale allowed Kalaskar’s application for suspension of sentence and bail during the pendency of his appeal against convict
